content.text: I'll read each frame to judge the continuity.
[Image: original 1280x6703, displayed at 382x2000. Multiply coordinates by 3.35 to map to original image.]

[{"ruleId":"V20","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"data.observed (lists/candidates) is periwinkle blue in video-01 (LISTENER/SONG columns) and video-03 (c1 arrow), matching the periwinkle probe/candidate dots in the embedded page-01 diagram. data.params (score/meter/annotation) is lilac purple in video-02 (arc, 'a·b -1.61') and video-03 ('4.2 x2 8.4'), matching lilac elements on page-01. text is warm cream in all video frames and page-01 body copy; bg is deep navy in every frame. data.error rose pink appears on video-03's flag and consistently on the page. No concept flips color between media.","suggestion":""},{"ruleId":"V21","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"All frames use only Night School palette: deep navy bg, warm cream text, periwinkle blue (video-01 lists), lilac purple (video-02 meter, video-03 scaling), amber probe dot (page-01 diagram), mint green accents (page-01 section headers/links), rose pink flag (video-03). No saturated out-of-palette primary red/green/blue observed.","suggestion":""},{"ruleId":"V22","pass":true,"severity":"advisory","evidence":"video-01/02/03 and page-01 share the same deep-navy background, warm-cream serif typographic temperature, and identical accent palette; the embedded diagram on page-01 matches the video meter/probe styling. Reads as one product family.","suggestion":""}]
